hero.description: Hand-rolled falafel, marinated overnight. Bread baked through the day. Take-away or eat in — every order is built to order.
hero.imageAlt: Overhead shot of a freshly wrapped kebab on warm cream paper, lit from above

featured.title: Our customers' favourites
featured.description: The dishes people order over and over.

kebab-tortilla-srodni.name: Kebab Tortilla Średni
kebab-tortilla-srodni.description: Beef + lamb mix, fresh salad, tahini sauce in a warm tortilla. Our most-ordered.
kebab-tortilla-srodni.imageAlt: Kebab tortilla wrap on cream paper

falafel-pita-duzy.name: Falafel Pita Duży
falafel-pita-duzy.description: Eight hand-rolled falafel, hummus, pickled turnips, parsley.

kapsalon-duzy.name: Kapsalon Duży
kapsalon-duzy.description: The Rotterdam classic. Fries, kebab, melted cheese, salad, sauce. Built for two.
kapsalon-duzy.imageAlt: Kapsalon with kebab and melted cheese

tacos-x3.name: Tacos x3
tacos-x3.description: Three soft tacos, your choice of kebab or falafel, salsa.

box-strips-mega.name: Box Strips Mega
box-strips-mega.description: Crispy chicken strips, fries, slaw, two sauces.
box-strips-mega.imageAlt: Box of crispy chicken strips and fries

salatka-kebab-duzy.name: Sałatka Kebab Duży
salatka-kebab-duzy.description: No bread — just greens, kebab meat, tahini, pomegranate.
salatka-kebab-duzy.imageAlt: Kebab salad bowl with greens and pomegranate

story.lead: We opened Szef Donald in 2014 with one rule: nothing comes out of a freezer. Bread is baked through the day. Falafel is rolled by hand every morning. Meat is marinated for eighteen hours before it touches the grill.
story.body: We're a small team — three cooks and a counter — and we keep it that way on purpose. Every wrap is made by someone who's been here long enough to care.
story.imageAlt: Cook turning meat on the grill, warm light

hoursLocation.title: Open seven days.
hoursLocation.mapAriaLabel: Map showing Szef Donald on Ul. Ks. Piotra Ściegiennego 68a, Kielce

testimonials.title: Trusted by thousands.
testimonials.description: 4.8 average rating across 1,247 reviews on Google.

0.quote: Best kebab in Kielce, hands down. The tahini sauce is on another level and you can tell the bread is fresh. I've been three times this month.
0.name: Kasia W.

1.quote: Falafel pita that actually tastes like it should — crispy outside, soft inside, properly spiced. My go-to vegetarian lunch.
1.name: Tomasz K.

2.quote: The kapsalon is dangerous. In a good way.
2.name: Anna M.

3.quote: Real quality and fair prices. Sometimes a wait on Fridays but worth it.
3.name: Michał R.

newsletter.title: Get a free baklava on your first order.
newsletter.description: Join the list — occasional emails, never spam. Unsubscribe whenever.
newsletter.subscribeSuccess: Welcome! Check your inbox for the code.
